claim: JCVI-Syn3A has a doubling time of approximately 2 hours in rich SP4 medium at 37 C.
source_detail: Thornburg 2022, abstract and throughout; used as the simulation target doubling time.
caveats: Real doubling time distribution in cultures is broad; 2 h is the median/target.
Depends on medium composition - growth in depleted or defined media is slower.
